hero.prob_take: At 54.5%, the market is essentially coin-flipping on whether Vancouver wins by 3+ goals, which means sharp money sees real two-way risk here despite the 8-point surge in conviction over 24 hours. daily_take.headline: Whitecaps -2.5 Surge 8 Points: Market Pricing in Injury News or Overreacting?
daily_take.deck: Vancouver just jumped 8 percentage points to 54.5% on a -2.5 spread, now trading above the fair-odds threshold for the first time. The sharp move signals either fresh roster intel or sloppy money chasing momentum. Check team news before the whistle: if the Whitecaps got their star midfielder back healthy or the opponent got banged up, this is fairly priced. If nothing material changed, this is a fade opportunity at 54.5%.
